nasb.text: Therefore its height was loftier than all the trees of the field And its boughs became many and its branches long Because of many waters as it spread them out.

esv.text: So it towered high above all the trees of the field; its boughs grew large and its branches long from abundant water in its shoots.

cnv.text: 因此，它樹身高大，高過田間的眾樹； 它發旺生長的時候，因為水源豐足， 所以枝子繁多，枝條長長。

ccb.text: 充足的水源使它高过田间所有的树木， 枝子长得又粗又长。
